title: Pack Manifest
subtitle: pack.json + assets.jsonl
description: Preferred editable canonical format for reviewed asset packs. Stores pack metadata in pack.json and one asset record per line in assets.jsonl; generated SQLite indexes consume it for fast search.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Pack Manifest contract: layout, pack.json fields, assets.jsonl rows, path boundary, and current Asset Index integration.

children.title: manifest.mjs
children.description: Reads packs/<pack-id>/pack.json and assets.jsonl into normalized asset records and pack summaries for Asset Index.
